annotations.label: Identity component of a compact Lie group

annotations.label: Structure of connected compact Lie groups

anchor.snippet: Every connected compact Lie group is the quotient by a finite central subgroup of a product of a simply connected compact Lie group and a torus

annotations.label: Decomposition of simply connected compact Lie groups

anchor.snippet: every compact, connected, simply-connected Lie group K is a product of finitely many compact, connected, simply-connected simple Lie groups

annotations.label: Correspondence with complex semisimple Lie algebras

anchor.snippet: The classification of compact, simply connected Lie groups is the same as the classification of complex semisimple Lie algebras
